ddt:Target.Name: N_PZ1A_EPS_UDS_PT_20201109
ddt:Target.Description:
[2]Nov 9th, 2020 Nissan XX6 Modified FFD and DM items, based on Rev1.
[1]Oct 16th, 2020 Nissan XX6 Solved DB checker's error based on V1.10.
[N]Jul 9th, 2019 Nissan XX6 Initial Creation. <ItemList: TBD_UDS_EPAS_ItemList_N(PZ1A).xlsx>

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Item.Text: enabled => EPS able to receive HFP request (consider HFP frames)(01h)
enabled => EPS able to receive HFP request (consider IPA frames)(02h)
LDW_VibrationIntensityReq from METER to be taken into account(default)(00h)
LDW_VibrationIntensityReq from IVI to be taken into account(01h)
LKA.SteeringTorqueRequest outside the safety limits defined in LKA_TrqMax and Max_LKA_Torque_Rate(02h)
(TBD)50% power manual mode controled by EPS1 (=7a#1/#2/#3)(04h)
(TBD)50% power manual mode controled by EPS2 (=9a#1/#2/#3)(07h)
(TBD)50% power manual mode controled by EPS1 (=7a#1/#2/#3)(04h)
(TBD)50% power manual mode controled by EPS2 (=9a#1/#2/#3)(07h)

Data.Name: DataRead_$0132_#004_bit0_(TBD)CAN Ignition status for state machine (main)
DataRead_$0232_#004_bit0_(TBD)CAN Ignition status for state machine (sub)
DataRead_$0159_#004_bit0_(TBD)Reset Pull-Drift long term assitant torque

Item.Text: (TBD)Park assist had never been used from the last time this DID was reset(00h)

Data.Name: DataRead_$01D8_#004_bit0_when EPS gets out of HFP's control because of HandsOnWheel
DataRead_$01D8_#007_bit0_when EPS gets out of HFP's control because of OverSpeed
DataRead_$01D8_#010_bit0_when EPS gets out of HFP's control because for other reasons
DataRead_$01D9_#004_bit0_(TBD)percentage over time of LKA maneuver without detection of hands on wheel
DataRead_$01D9_#005_bit0_(TBD)LKA is being used AND InputTorque < LKA_Threshold_LowTorque
DataRead_$01D9_#008_bit0_(TBD)LKA is being used AND LKA_Threshold_LowTorque <= InputTorque < LKA_Threshold_HighTorque
DataRead_$01D9_#012_bit0_(TBD)LKA is being used AND InputTorque >= LKA_Threshold_HighTorque
DataRead_$01D9_#015_bit0_(TBD)LKA is being used AND SWA < LKA_Threshold_LowSWA
DataRead_$01D9_#018_bit0_(TBD)LKA is being used AND LKA_Threshold_LowSWA <= SWA < LKA_Threshold_HighSWA
DataRead_$01D9_#022_bit0_(TBD)LKA is being used AND SWA >= LKA_Threshold_HighSWA
DataRead_$01D9_#025_bit0_(TBD)LKA is being used AND LateralAccel < LKA_Threshold_LowLatAcc
DataRead_$01D9_#028_bit0_(TBD)LKA is being used AND LKA_Threshold_LowLatAcc <= LateralAccel < LKA_Threshold_HighLatAcc
DataRead_$01D9_#032_bit0_(TBD)LKA is being used AND LateralAccel >= LKA_Threshold_HighLatAcc
DataRead_$01DA_#004_bit0_(TBD)percentage over time of LDW maneuver without detection of hands on wheel
DataRead_$01DA_#005_bit0_(TBD)when LDW is being used AND InputTorque < LDW_Threshold_LowTorque
DataRead_$01DA_#008_bit0_(TBD)when LDW is being used AND LDW_Threshold_LowTorque <= InputTorque < LDW_Threshold_HighTorque
DataRead_$01DA_#012_bit0_(TBD)when LDW is being used AND InputTorque >= LDW_Threshold_HighTorque
DataRead_$01DA_#015_bit0_(TBD)when LDW is being used AND SWA < LDW_Threshold_LowSWA
DataRead_$01DA_#018_bit0_(TBD)when LDW is being used AND LDW_Threshold_LowSWA <= SWA < LDW_Threshold_HighSWA
DataRead_$01DA_#022_bit0_(TBD)when LDW is being used AND SWA >= LDW_Threshold_HighSWA
DataRead_$01DA_#025_bit0_(TBD)when LDW is being used AND LateralAccel < LDW_Threshold_LowLatAcc
DataRead_$01DA_#028_bit0_(TBD)when LDW is being used AND LDW_Threshold_LowLatAcc <= LateralAccel < LDW_Threshold_HighLatAcc
DataRead_$01DA_#032_bit0_(TBD)when LDW is being used AND LateralAccel >= LDW_Threshold_HighLatAcc
DataRead_$01DC_#004_bit0_(TBD)when TJP is ended due to Torque Override detection
DataRead_$01DC_#006_bit0_(TBD)when TJP is ended due to CAN failure (e.g: invalid/absent/frozen Clock/Wrong CRC)
DataRead_$01DC_#008_bit0_(TBD)when TJP is ended due to EPS_Assist_Level below 80% (TBC)
DataRead_$01DC_#010_bit0_(TBD)when TJP is ended due to battery disconnected
DataRead_$01DC_#011_bit0_(TBD)when TJP is ended due to EPS internal failure

DataRead_$01DC_#012_bit0_(TBD)percentage over time of TJP maneuver without detection of hands on wheel (value = (time(TJP on & Hands off confirmed)/(time TJP On) since first vehicle use or since last DID reset)
DataRead_$01DC_#013_bit0_(TBD)percentage over time of TJP maneuver with an absolute "Input Torque" inferior than TJP_Threshold_LowTorque (InputTorque < TJP_Threshold_LowTorque)

DataRead_$01DC_#014_bit0_(TBD)percentage over time of TJP maneuver with an absolute "Input Torque" between TJP_Threshold_LowTorque and TJP_Threshold_HighTorque (TJP_Threshold_LowTorque <= InputTorque < TJP_Threshold_HighTorque)
DataRead_$01DC_#015_bit0_(TBD)percentage over time of TJP maneuver with an absolute "Input Torque" superior than TJP_Threshold_HighTorque (InputTorque >= TJP_Threshold_HighTorque)
DataRead_$01DC_#016_bit0_(TBD)percentage over time of TJP maneuver with an absolute SWA inferior than TJP_Threshold_LowSWA (SWA < TJP_Threshold_LowSWA)
DataRead_$01DC_#017_bit0_(TBD)percentage over time of TJP maneuver with an absolute SWA between TJP_Threshold_LowSWA and TJP_Threshold_HighSWA (TJP_Threshold_LowSWA <= SWA < TJP_Threshold_HighSWA)
DataRead_$01DC_#018_bit0_(TBD)percentage over time of TJP maneuver with an absolute SWA superior than TJP_Threshold_HighSWA (SWA >= TJP_Threshold_HighSWA)
DataRead_$01DC_#019_bit0_(TBD)percentage over time of TJP maneuver with an absolute LateralAccel inferior than TJP_Threshold_LowLatAcc ( LateralAccel < TJP_Threshold_LowLatAcc)

DataRead_$01DC_#020_bit0_(TBD)percentage over time of TJP maneuver with an absolute LateralAccel between TJP_Threshold_LowLatAcc and TJP_Threshold_HighLatAcc (TJP_Threshold_LowLatAcc <= LateralAccel < TJP_Threshold_HighLatAcc)
DataRead_$01DC_#021_bit0_(TBD)percentage over time of TJP maneuver with an absolute LateralAccel superior than TJP_Threshold_HighLatAcc (LateralAccel >= TJP_Threshold_HighLatAcc)
DataRead_$01DD_#004_bit0_(TBD)when PullDrift is being used AND DriverColumnTorque < 0 AND Abs(DriverColumnTorque) < PullDrift_Threshold_LowTorque_Right
DataRead_$01DD_#007_bit0_(TBD)when PullDrift is being used AND DriverColumnTorque < 0 AND PullDrift_Threshold_LowTorque_Right <= Abs(DriverColumnTorque) < PullDrift_Threshold_HighTorque_Right
DataRead_$01DD_#011_bit0_(TBD)when PullDrift is being used AND DriverColumnTorque < 0 AND Abs(DriverColumnTorque) >= PullDrift_Threshold_HighTorque_Right
DataRead_$01DD_#014_bit0_(TBD)when PullDrift is being used AND DriverColumnTorque > 0 AND Abs(DriverColumnTorque) < PullDrift_Threshold_LowTorque_Left
DataRead_$01DD_#017_bit0_(TBD)when PullDrift is being used AND DriverColumnTorque > 0 AND PullDrift_Threshold_LowTorque_Left <= Abs(DriverColumnTorque) < PullDrift_Threshold_HighTorque_Left
DataRead_$01DD_#021_bit0_(TBD)when PullDrift is being used AND DriverColumnTorque > 0 AND Abs(DriverColumnTorque) >= PullDrift_Threshold_HighTorque_Left
DataRead_$01F1_#004_bit0_(TBD)when AD2 is ended due to TBD
DataRead_$01F1_#006_bit0_(TBD)when AD2 is ended due to TBD
DataRead_$01F1_#008_bit0_(TBD)when AD2 is ended due to TBD
DataRead_$01F1_#013_bit0_(TBD)percentage over time of AD2 maneuver with an absolute "Input Torque" smaller than AD2_Threshold_LowTorque (InputTorque < AD2_Threshold_LowTorque)

DataRead_$01F1_#014_bit0_(TBD)percentage over time of AD2 maneuver with an absolute "Input Torque" between AD2_Threshold_LowTorque and AD2_Threshold_HighTorque (AD2_Threshold_LowTorque <= InputTorque < AD2_Threshold_HighTorque)
DataRead_$01F1_#015_bit0_(TBD)percentage over time of AD2 maneuver with an absolute "Input Torque" superior than AD2_Threshold_HighTorque (InputTorque >= AD2_Threshold_HighTorque)
DataRead_$01F1_#016_bit0_(TBD)percentage over time of AD2 maneuver with an absolute SWA inferior than AD2_Threshold_LowSWA (SWA < AD2_Threshold_LowSWA)
DataRead_$01F1_#017_bit0_(TBD)percentage over time of AD2 maneuver with an absolute SWA between AD2_Threshold_LowSWA and AD2_Threshold_HighSWA (AD2_Threshold_LowSWA <= SWA < AD2_Threshold_HighSWA)
DataRead_$01F1_#018_bit0_(TBD)percentage over time of AD2 maneuver with an absolute SWA superior than AD2_Threshold_HighSWA (SWA >= AD2_Threshold_HighSWA)
DataRead_$01F1_#019_bit0_(TBD)percentage over time of AD2 maneuver with an absolute LateralAccel inferior than AD2_Threshold_LowLatAcc ( LateralAccel < TJP_Threshold_LowLatAcc)

DataRead_$01F1_#020_bit0_(TBD)percentage over time of AD2 maneuver with an absolute LateralAccel between AD2_Threshold_LowLatAcc and AD2_Threshold_HighLatAcc (AD2_Threshold_LowLatAcc <= LateralAccel < AD2_Threshold_HighLatAcc)
DataRead_$01F1_#021_bit0_(TBD)percentage over time of AD2 maneuver with an absolute LateralAccel superior than AD2_Threshold_HighLatAcc (LateralAccel >= AD2_Threshold_HighLatAcc)"
DataRead_$C002_#004_bit0_(TBD)EPS_SWA manual L2L recovery occurrences counter
